claimText: CUHK emphasizes responsible and ethical use of generative AI in education, prohibiting unauthorized AI use in assignments while allowing its use under specific conditions with proper citation and permissions.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI in Education - Centre for Learning Enhancement And Research (CLEAR), CUHK
citation.publisher: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
